name: Spam-Mac Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the elbow macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. In a medium saucepan, melt butter over low heat.
3. Add chopped onion and cook until tender.
4. Stir in flour, mustard, and pepper. Gradually blend in milk, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
5. Add cheese and stir until melted.
6. Combine the cooked macaroni, cubed Spam, peas and carrots with the cheese sauce in a large bowl.
7. Transfer the mixture to a 3-quart baking dish.
8. Sprinkle buttered bread crumbs over the top.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until hot and bubbly, about 30 minutes.
10. Serve and enjoy leftovers within 6 to 8 servings.
